insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain valuable insights into your strengths and areas for improvement. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can build momentum and develop a growth mindset that will help you overcome initial challenges and steadily increase your scores over time.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
